data_gaps: ECI’s consolidated Statistical Report for WB Assembly 2026 (vote shares, NOTA, gender/age participation) not yet available as a static PDF.
Definitive, single-source CAPF headcount and deployment-by-district matrix; current figures are from official briefings reported by media.
Granular turnout and margin analytics at AC level merged with 2024 LS segment data require a cleaned, joined dataset.

timeline.significance: Establishes 6.445 crore electors; notes 60.06 lakh ‘under adjudication’
Two-phase polling Apr 23 and Apr 29; counting May 4
ECI voids polling at 15 PS in two ACs after complaints
ECI posts party-wise tallies; Falta excluded
Countermanded poll for severe electoral offences; result due May 24
timeline.source: Economic Times report on ECI order
